ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "rain_precip" REAL /* Rain precipitation in millimeters */,
  "snow_precip" REAL /* Snow precipitation in millimeters */,
  "snow_precip_accumulated" REAL /* Accumulated snow precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "air_pressure" INTEGER /* Air pressure in hectopascals */,
  "octal_cloud_coverage" INTEGER /* Octal cloud coverage (0-8) */,
  "precip_amount" REAL /* Precipitation amount in millimeters */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Description of cloud cover */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "road_cond" TEXT /* Road condition (e.g., Moist, Dry) */,
  "surf_temp" REAL /* Surface temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "snow_amount" REAL /* Snow amount in millimeters */,
  "sub_temp" REAL /* Subsurface temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius (from weather data) */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius (from weather data) */,
  "water_amount" REAL /* Water amount in millimeters */,
  "snow_sum" REAL /* Snow sum in millimeters */,
  "road_material" TEXT /* Material of the road surface */,
  "traffic_flow" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles passing through the area per hour */,
  "road_width" REAL /* Width of the road in meters */,
  "road_slope" REAL /* Slope of the road in degrees */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "forecast_length" INTEGER /* Length of the forecast in hours */,
  "stn_surf_temp" REAL /* Station surface temperature forecast in degrees Celsius */,
  "stn_dew_point" REAL /* Station dew point forecast in degrees Celsius */,
  "radiation" REAL /* Radiation forecast in watts per square meter */,
  "shade" INTEGER /* Shade forecast (0 for no shade, 1 for shade) */,
  "surf_temp_sqerror" REAL /* Squared error of the surface temperature forecast */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the forecast */,
  "humidity_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_direction_forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted direction of the wind */,
  "visibility_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted visibility in kilometers */,
  "cloud_cover_forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted cloud cover */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance crew, traffic management officer, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "air_temp_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the air temperature data is valid */,
  "dew_point_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dew point data is valid */,
  "rain_precip_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rain precipitation data is valid */,
  "snow_precip_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the snow precipitation data is valid */,
  "snow_precip_accumulated_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the accumulated snow precipitation data is valid */,
  "wind_speed_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the wind speed data is valid */,
  "wind_direction_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the wind direction data is valid */,
  "air_pressure_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the air pressure data is valid */,
  "octal_cloud_coverage_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the octal cloud coverage data is valid */,
  "precip_amount_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the precipitation amount data is valid */,
  "visibility_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the visibility data is valid */,
  "humidity_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the humidity data is valid */,
  "cloud_cover_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the cloud cover data is valid */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., road closure, accident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the incident in minutes */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the incident in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred due to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
